empathetic_output.support_response: Can you tell me a bit more about your situation? Are you currently using temporary solutions while waiting for your order, such as borrowing chairs from colleagues or friends? Any details you can share will help us better understand your needs and find an appropriate resolution for you.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order, <ORDER_ID>, for <PRODUCT>, which is now three weeks past the expected delivery date. I've been working on the floor temporarily, but I need a more permanent solution and would like to know when I can expect to receive my chair. I haven't received any updates from the courier, so I'd appreciate it if you could look into this and provide a revised delivery timeline or let me know if a refund is possible so I can explore local purchasing options. If there's any additional information you need from me to facilitate this, please let me know.
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: Can you tell me a bit more about your situation? Are you currently using temporary solutions while waiting for your order, such as borrowing chairs from colleagues or friends? Any details you can share will help us better understand your needs and find an appropriate resolution for you.

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the matter further with our logistics department to determine the cause of delay in delivering your product. Once we have obtained an updated estimated delivery timeframe, we shall inform you accordingly via email. Please be assured that we value your patience during this period as we work towards resolving this issue promptly.
